description: SGLT2 inhibitor CKD outcome trials — kidney-failure composite endpoint. Three trials, all real published HRs. Contrasts with GLP-1 CVOT pool: smaller k=3 (forces fixed-effect fallback), narrower CIs (higher event rate at this stage of CKD), genuine consistency.
endpoint: Kidney-failure composite (sustained eGFR decline ≥50%, ESKD, or renal/CV death depending on trial-specific definition)

trials.population: Adults with CKD eGFR 25-75 + UACR 200-5000 (T2D and non-T2D)
trials.primary_outcome: Sustained eGFR decline ≥50%, ESKD, renal/CV death (composite)
trials.snippet: Heerspink HJL et al. NEJM 2020;383(15):1436-1446. Dapagliflozin in Patients with Chronic Kidney Disease (DAPA-CKD).

trials.population: Adults with CKD eGFR 20-45 (any albuminuria) OR eGFR 45-90 + UACR ≥200 (broad CKD)
trials.primary_outcome: CKD progression (sustained eGFR <10, sustained ≥40% eGFR decline, ESKD, renal death) OR CV death
trials.snippet: The EMPA-KIDNEY Collaborative Group. NEJM 2023;388(2):117-127. Empagliflozin in Patients with Chronic Kidney Disease.

trials.primary_outcome: ESKD, doubling of serum creatinine, renal or CV death (composite)
trials.snippet: Perkovic V et al. NEJM 2019;380(24):2295-2306. Canagliflozin and Renal Outcomes in Type 2 Diabetes and Nephropathy (CREDENCE).

use_cases: Tests nonph_flag=false when all Schoenfeld p > 0.05
Cross-class validation: pack works outside cardiology (kidney outcomes)
